findings.message: Action or reusable workflow is not pinned to a full commit SHA: actions/checkout@v6

remediation.summary: Pin external actions and reusable workflows to a full commit SHA.

findings.whyItMatters: Mutable refs such as tags and branches can change without notice, which increases supply-chain risk in GitHub Actions workflows.
